topics: Implement linear regression with one variable on the California Housing dataset to predict housing prices based on a single feature (e.g., the average number of rooms per dwelling) using gradient descent and the normal equation, and evaluate with MSE and R-squared
Implement polynomial regression on the Auto MPG dataset to predict miles per gallon (MPG) based on engine displacement, and compare polynomial regression results with linear regression
Implement Ridge and Lasso regression on the Diabetes dataset, tune hyperparameters using cross-validation, and compare the performance of these regularized models with standard linear regression
Estimate the parameters of a logistic regression model using MLE and MAP on the Breast Cancer Wisconsin dataset, and compare the results and discuss the effects of regularization
Use MLE and MAP to estimate the parameters of a multinomial distribution on the 20 Newsgroups dataset, and explore the impact of different priors on the estimation
Implement a logistic regression model to predict the likelihood of a disease using the Pima Indians Diabetes dataset, and compare the performance with and without feature scaling
Implement a Naïve Bayes classifier to categorize text documents into topics using the 20 Newsgroups dataset, and compare the performance of Multinomial Naïve Bayes with Bernoulli Naïve Bayes
Implement the K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) algorithm for image classification using the Fashion MNIST dataset, experiment with different values of K, and analyze their impact on model performance

Implement a Decision Tree classifier using the ID3 algorithm to segment customers based on their purchasing behavior using the Online Retail dataset, and analyze the tree structure and feature importance
Implement and compare Logistic Regression and Decision Trees on the Adult Income dataset for predicting income levels, and evaluate both models based on performance metrics and interpretability
Implement a Linear Support Vector Machine (SVM) to classify the Iris dataset, visualize the decision boundary, and discuss how the margin is determined
Implement and compare the performance of SVM classifiers with linear, polynomial, and RBF kernels on the Fashion MNIST dataset, and analyze the advantages and disadvantages of each kernel type

Implement and train a Multilayer Feed-Forward Network (MLP) on the Wine Quality dataset, experiment with different numbers of hidden layers and neurons, and discuss how these choices affect the network's performance

Implement and compare the performance of a neural network using different activation functions (Sigmoid, ReLU, Tanh) on the MNIST dataset, and analyze how each activation function affects training and accuracy

Implement and perform hyperparameter tuning for a neural network on the Fashion MNIST dataset, experiment with different learning rates, batch sizes, and epochs, and discuss the impact on model performance
Implement and compare hierarchical (agglomerative) and partitional (K-means) clustering algorithms on the Mall Customers dataset, and discuss the strengths and weaknesses of each method
Implement and apply K-means clustering to the Digits dataset, experiment with different numbers of clusters, and evaluate using metrics such as inertia and silhouette score
Implement bootstrapping and cross-validation on the Iris dataset, compare the model performance metrics obtained using these resampling methods, and discuss their advantages and disadvantages
Implement bagging and boosting ensemble methods on the Titanic dataset, compare the performance of both methods, and discuss how each method improves model performance
Investigate the bias-variance tradeoff using polynomial regression on the Boston Housing dataset, plot the training and validation errors for various polynomial degrees, and discuss the tradeoff
